title: Petunga roxburghii
uses: Petunga roxburghii is used in traditional medicine. It is reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts are used to treat various health conditions, including fever and gastrointestinal issues. In some cultures, it is used to treat respiratory problems and skin conditions. Petunga roxburghii is also believed to have antioxidant properties.

The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. It is also used to treat digestive issues and is thought to have antimicrobial properties that can help to prevent infections. The plant's leaves and bark are commonly used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of health issues. Further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Petunga roxburghii for medicinal purposes.
